title: atacportray/atacportray pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 must be provided (paired-end required for ATAC-seq / MACS3 BAMPE), cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

condition.errorMessage: Condition/group label (e.g. IC_High, IC_Low) must not contain spaces

patient.errorMessage: Patient/donor identifier must not contain spaces
